_description: Mobile template: submit a governed change proposal via async inbox dispatch.
_usage: POST /inbox/enqueue with prompt field populated from this template.

payload.prompt:
Submit a change proposal with the following details:

- Title: <short descriptive title>
- Action: <create|modify|delete>
- Target file: <relative path from spine root>
- Rationale: <why this change is needed>
- Parent loop: <LOOP-NAME or null>

Use proposals.apply with action flag. Stage the file under files/ directory. Report the proposal ID and status when done.

example_filled.prompt:
Submit a change proposal with the following details:

- Title: Add receipts.summary to bridge allowlist
- Action: modify
- Target file: ops/bindings/mailroom.bridge.consumers.yaml
- Rationale: Mobile sessions need receipts visibility for audit trail review
- Parent loop: LOOP-MOBILE-COMMAND-CENTER-20260302

Use proposals.apply with action flag. Stage the file under files/ directory. Report the proposal ID and status when done.
